message:
fix(daemon): set 0o600 permissions on state.json temp files (bd-z0j)

state.json temp files created during atomic writes inherited the
default umask, making them readable by other users on multi-user
systems. Use OpenOptions with explicit mode(0o600) on Unix so the
final state.json is owner-only accessible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
